id: run-multi-precheck

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"MultiPrecheck"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v1/scorings/precheck/extended/batches"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Multi precheck is basic Precheck run on many clients. Typically used outside businness 
hours. Operation is asynchronous, partner gets only unique identifier of batch and the 
result is available in Multi precheck result resource (see [Multi precheck result](#multi-precheck-result))

Resource has to be called with valid access token (see the [Security section](./security)) 
from your server. If you plan to integrate it in a client flow, you should implement REST endpoint 
bound to your shopping basket session that will be used as a proxy to call HC API - 
**NEVER put access token directly to client side.**

Possible error codes explanation:

| Status code | Code            | Explanation          |
| ----------- | --------------- | -------------------- |
| 400         | INVALID_REQUEST  | Request was not well formatted (malformed request syntax, size too large, etc.) |
| 500         | FAILURE | Internal failure |


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["scoringData"],"properties":{"scoringData":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["customer"],"properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","required":["firstName","lastName","email","phone","externalId"],"properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","example":"John","description":"Customer first (given) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"lastName":{"type":"string","example":"Newborn","description":"Customer last (family) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"email":{"type":"string","example":"john.newborn@country.com","description":"E-mail address of customer. MUST be valid email according to [RFC 2822](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2822)."},"phone":{"type":"string","example":"+420777123456","description":"Mobile phone number with country code (including leading `+`)."},"externalId":{"type":"string","example":"1576849","description":"Unique customer's identifier in partner's system. Typically used for linking request and response together."}},"title":"PrecheckCustomer"}},"title":"ScoringData"}},"notificationEndpoint":{"type":"string","example":"https://www.youreshop.cz/multiPrecheck/results","description":"URL of the partner used as a notification endpoint for providing information about result of multi precheck. Must be valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). Maximum 1000 characters."}},"title":"MultiPrecheckRequest"},"example":{"scoringData":[{"customer":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","email":"john.newborn@country.com","phone":"+420777123456","externalId":"1576849"}}],"notificationEndpoint":"https://www.youreshop.cz/multiPrecheck/results"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["id"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier of multi precheck's batch."}},"title":"MultiPrecheckResponse"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"id":""}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Error in processing request","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["errors"],"properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["code","message","severity"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","example":"BAD_REQUEST","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","example":"Bad request","description":"Human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","example":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","description":"JSON path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","example":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4","description":"Internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"title":"Error"},"description":"Array with errors"}},"title":"Errors"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
